summary: Story 1.4b is internally well scoped, sourced, and testable for service and authorization work, but it is blocked because required dependency Story 1.4a is currently NO-GO and not implementation-ready.

template_compliance.notes: Required story sections are present, including Status, Executor Assignment, Story, Acceptance Criteria, Integration Verification, CodeRabbit Integration, Tasks / Subtasks, Dev Notes, Testing, Change Log, Dev Agent Record, and QA Results. No obvious template placeholders were found.

executor_assignment.notes: Primary Type API with Security/Database secondary scope maps acceptably to executor @dev and quality_gate @architect. Both are distinct known agents and quality_gate_tools are non-empty.

dependency_sequence.notes: Story 1.4b explicitly requires Story 1.4a schema foundation. Current PO validation for Story 1.4a is NO-GO due PO-BLOCK-1.4A-001, so 1.4b cannot start implementation.

goal_context_clarity.notes: The story value, second-slice interpretation, reliance on Story 1.4a schema, reliance on Story 1.3 shared-editing decisions, and dependency for Story 1.4c are explicit.

technical_guidance.notes: The story clearly specifies MemoryRecordPolicy, MemoryRecordService::createDiaryRecord(), authorization before persistence, tenant-scoped record/tag/highlight writes, tag normalization/reuse, highlight ordering, and a no-UI/no-route boundary.

reference_effectiveness.notes: Claims were cross-checked against PRD Story 1.4, architecture tenant access rules, collaboration mode architecture, service architecture, UI architecture service template, and existing MemoryWorkspaceSettingsService.

self_containment.notes: A Dev agent has enough context to implement the service and policy boundary once Story 1.4a exists.

testing_guidance.notes: Focused service/policy coverage, Story 1.4a schema regression, Story 1.3 workspace settings regression, route/profile regressions, and Pint formatting are specified with Sail-prefixed commands.

security_scope.notes: Tenant membership authorization, shared-editing source of truth, denial before writes, no private leakage, and exclusions for media, public sharing, visibility expansion, and period/trip behavior are clear.

coderabbit_integration.notes: CodeRabbit is enabled in core-config.yaml and the story includes analysis, agents, quality gates, self-healing, and API/security/database focus areas.

code_intelligence.notes: isCodeIntelAvailable returned false in this session.

anti_hallucination.notes: No invented feature scope was found. The story stays within PRD Story 1.4 service/policy needs and architecture service boundaries.

dev_readiness.notes: Implementation should not start until Story 1.4a is corrected, approved, implemented, and its schema/model tests are passing.

blockers.title: Required dependency Story 1.4a is not implementation-ready
blockers.evidence: Story 1.4b requires Story 1.4a schema foundation, but Story 1.4a currently has PO validation decision NO-GO in .ai/story-1-4a-validation-20260605T175854-0300.json.
blockers.required_fix: Resolve PO-BLOCK-1.4A-001, revalidate Story 1.4a, then implement and verify the schema/model foundation before starting Story 1.4b.

nice_to_have: No internal content changes are required for Story 1.4b based on this validation pass.
Jira child story sync remains pending; local story artifacts are the source of truth until PO/DevOps explicitly sync them.
